plugins.name: upkeep
plugins.description: macOS system cleanup and updater with an AI-driven update advisor. v1.3 adds three new agents to /upkeep:update: changelog-reader fetches upstream release notes (allowlisted hosts only) and grades each bump's severity; project-impact scans your workspaces for manifests that depend on the tools being upgraded; failure-diagnoser turns post-apply errors into copy-paste fix suggestions (text only, never auto-executed). v1.2 prompt-injection hardening preserved: hardcoded dispatcher, discovery JSON sanitization, exact-match remote URL validation, trust-on-first-use for skill repos, Discover/Approve/Apply turn separation.
